_README: WhatsApp message templates. Placeholders in {curly_braces} are filled by execution/draft_whatsapp.py. Edit the wording freely; keep the placeholder names.

templates.request_payment_proof: Hello {customer_name}, your order is reserved. As payment is by bank transfer, please send a screenshot of the transfer of AED {total} so we can release your order for delivery. Thank you.
templates.request_correct_phone: Hello, this is Beyond Style. We could not verify a valid UAE mobile number for your delivery. Could you please reply with your correct mobile number (for example 05X XXX XXXX) so the courier can reach you?
templates.confirm_address_change: Hello {customer_name}, we noticed your delivery area is now {area}, {emirate}. The delivery fee for this area is AED {delivery_fee}, so your new total is AED {total} (was AED {old_total}). Please reply CONFIRM to accept the updated total.
templates.dispatch_notice: Good news {customer_name}, your Beyond Style order is verified and being prepared for dispatch to {area}, {emirate}. We will share tracking details shortly.
